description: Information security controls from ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Annex A, organized by the four themes introduced in the 2022 revision.

control_families.name: Organizational Controls
control_families.description: Policies, roles, responsibilities, and management direction for information security across the organization, including threat intelligence, asset management, and supplier relationships.
example_controls: A.5.19 Information Security in Supplier Relationships
A.5.23 Information Security for Cloud Services

control_families.name: People Controls
control_families.description: Controls related to personnel before, during, and after employment, including screening, awareness, training, disciplinary processes, and responsibilities after termination.
example_controls: A.6.2 Terms and Conditions of Employment
A.6.3 Information Security Awareness, Education and Training

control_families.name: Physical Controls
control_families.description: Controls for securing physical premises, equipment, and media including physical entry, office security, monitoring, and protection against environmental threats.
example_controls: A.7.3 Securing Offices, Rooms and Facilities
A.7.5 Protecting Against Physical and Environmental Threats
A.7.7 Clear Desk and Clear Screen
A.7.14 Secure Disposal or Re-Use of Equipment

control_families.name: Technological Controls
control_families.description: Controls for endpoint devices, access rights, authentication, capacity management, malware protection, vulnerability management, logging, network security, cryptography, secure development, and data protection.
example_controls: A.8.31 Separation of Development, Test and Production Environments
A.8.34 Protection of Information Systems During Audit Testing
